message: create a hello world flow that receives a required 'name' field and returns 'Hello, <name>!'
flow that POSTs to https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts with title and body from input, then GETs /posts/1 to validate the roundtrip
approval flow: receives a description, pauses at webhook_wait waiting for the 'approval' event with a 1-hour timeout, branches between approved/denied and finishes with an end node in each branch
Stripe payment router: receives a webhook payload, branches by method ('card', 'bank_slip', 'pix') into 3 paths, each path calls a different URL
lead enrichment: receives email, runs HTTP GET against an enrichment API, calculates a numeric score in elixir_code and returns {score, tier}
saga with compensation: reserves inventory, charges the customer, and if any step fails triggers fail with an explanatory message
receives a contact list {email, phone}, uses for_each to send a notification in each channel, finishes with an end node reporting how many were sent
flow that starts a remote job via POST, loops with a 2s delay and a condition to test status, returns when status=='completed' or fails after 30 attempts
incident pipeline: receives severity, immediately escalates critical incidents via HTTP POST, waits for approval via webhook_wait when high, otherwise only logs debug
LLM router: receives a category ('code', 'summary', 'translation'), routes to the appropriate model through http_request and returns the response
